abilities.name: Quick Getaway (Mask)
abilities.description: After resolving vs enemy, push this character up to 5 yards in any direction.

abilities.name: Bulletproof +1
abilities.description: Reduce all Ranged Combat damage by 1 (minimum 1).

abilities.name: Gunfighter
abilities.description: May use Pistols as if Range y2.

actions: (1) Collier Navy (Pistol) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y2 or z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2. Tome Drop It: Target passes TN 10 Centering duel or drops held item.
(2) Run and Gun | Discard Twist. Move up to Walk, make (1) AP Ranged Combat attack, move up to Walk.
system.notes: Many escaped convicts plaguing the Northern Hills and Contract Towns. Rob mining towns and Guild trains.
